case_title: BORICHEVSKY, MICHAEL vs. MACAMBO INC., DBA MACAMBO CLUB AND RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORICHEVSKY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MACAMBO INC., DBA MACAMBO CLUB AND RESTAURANT
